ocr_findings.description: Lesson header 'Lesson 02-03' and decorative computer/security illustration are represented as img placeholder. The 第2章 法務 side tab label is captured in the OCR text. All body content is faithfully reproduced.

reviewer_notes: Page is the opening of Lesson 02-03 セキュリティ関連法規 (p.61), introducing サイバーセキュリティ基本法. OCR accurately captures all body paragraphs including the key point about '国全体' being the target. No content loss. Label confirmed as content.
